steps.title: Apply the risk relationship
steps.content: Haddad found that among consumers who value environmental conservation, higher perceived environmental risk lowers purchase likelihood. The Australian study found that middle-aged adults had the lowest perceived environmental risk for the new television.

steps.title: Predict purchase likelihood
steps.content: Choice A adds an unsupported claim about other priorities. Choice C compares the television with other products not discussed. Choice D denies meaningful group differences even though the risk perception differs by group. Lower perceived risk would predict greater willingness to buy. The answer is B.
